description_long: This is a single-tier, round cake with a smooth, pale exterior, likely covered in fondant or a similar icing. The cake has a minimalist design, with only a couple of small, upright decorations or candles on top, adding a subtle accent. The surface is even and unadorned, with no visible piping, patterns, or elaborate decorations. The sides of the cake are straight and the top is flat, giving it a clean, modern appearance. The cake sits directly on a flat surface without any visible plate or stand. Its overall look is understated and elegant, suitable for a simple celebration or urban café display.
description: A smooth, round, pale cake with a minimalist design and a couple of small upright decorations or candles on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's smooth, pale surface with two small upright decorations or candles visible on top.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the cake's clean, unadorned back and the subtle curve of its round shape.
description_view_2: Side view displays the cake's even, flat top and the upright decorations or candles from a different angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the cake's minimalist surface and the decorations or candles from behind.
